visualtracker-0.1.22.description:
First Release of the Archipelago Visual Tracker.

Requirements:
- Valid Archipelago install
- Latest version of Universal Tracker

Packs for the tracker can be created using the [Mapping Preset Editor](https://github.com/Wakamu/archipelago-mapping-editor/releases/latest)
visualtracker-0.1.22.title: First Release (0.1.22)
